headline: IFF Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Volume Growth & Productivity Gains
summary: International Flavors beats Q1 estimates on volume growth and productivity gains, boosting margins and cash flow while reaffirming 2026 outlook despite a softer sales decline.
